description_long: This bird features an elongated body with olive-green upperparts and a slightly lighter underbelly. Its head is dark gray to black with a distinct white patch on the cheek and a white throat, while the beak is slender and slightly curved, well-suited for probing flowers or foliage. The wings and tail are olive-brown, blending smoothly into the body, and the tail is straight and moderately long. The legs are short and dark, barely visible from the side views. The plumage is smooth and sleek, with subtle color transitions and no prominent barring or spotting. The overall appearance is streamlined, suggesting a bird adapted for agile movement among branches or shrubs.
description: A sleek, olive-green bird with a dark head, white cheek patch, and slender curved beak. Its streamlined body and smooth plumage give it an agile, graceful look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated olive-green body, dark head with white cheek patch, and slender curved beak.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the smooth, olive-brown back and tail, with the wings folded tightly against the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same olive-green body, dark head, and white throat patch.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the pointed beak, dark face, and symmetrical white markings on the throat and cheeks.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid olive-green upperparts with a dark head, white cheek patch, and smooth color transitions; no prominent bars or spots.
